title: Day 53 Lesson 1 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:

Sentence 1 - パーティーまでに　なにを　して　おいたら　いいですか。= What should I prepare in advance before the party?

Sentence 2 - リンさんは　のみものを　れいぞうこに　いれて　おいて　ください。= Please put the drinks in the fridge, Lin-san.

Sentence 3 - わたしは　つくえと　いすを　ならべて　おきます。= I will arrange the chairs and desks.

Sentence 4 - パーティーが　おわったら、　でんきを　けして　おいて　ください。= After the party finishes, please turn the lights off.

Sentence 5 - つくえと　いすを　かたづけて　おいて　ください。= Please put away the chairs and desks.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
